feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: Advances in Symbolic Execution: A Workshop on C, JavaScript, and WebAssembly

link.title: Advances in Symbolic Execution: A Workshop on C, JavaScript, and WebAssembly

entry.content:
Program Schedule

9:00 AM - 10:30 AM - Symbolic Execution for WebAssembly and C

  1. 20 mins - João Borges - Static Symbolic Execution
  2. 20 mins - Filipe Marques - Concolic Execution
  3. 20 mins - Francisco Sena - Parameterized Execution

11:00 AM - 12:00 PM - Summaries in Symbolic Execution

  1. 20 mins - Frederico Ramos - Summaries for Symbolic Execution
  2. 20 mins - Manuel Costa - Symbolic Summaries for JavaScript
  3. 20 mins - Rafael Gonçalves - Synthesizing Symbolic Summaries

12:00 PM - 1:30 PM - Lunch

1:30 PM - 3:00 PM - Symbolic Execution for JavaScript

  1. 20 mins - André Nascimento - ECMA-SL: An Intermediate Representation for JavaScript Analysis
  2. 20 mins - Filipe Marques - Symbolic Execution for JavaScript
  3. 20 mins - Miguel Monteiro - Explode.js: Identifying Security Vulnerabilities in Node.js Applications via Symbolic Execution

3:00 PM - 6:00 PM - Symbolic Memory Models

  1. 20 mins - André Mendes - Symbolic Memory Models for C Language
  2. 20 mins - Tutorial: Implementing 3 Symbolic Memory Models in While Language
